productDisplayName: Scullers Men Green & Navy Blue Shirt
description: Style NoteThis shirt from scullers adds a big dose of style to your casual look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this shirt, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and casual footwear.Product DetailsGreen checked shirt, has a spread collar, long sleeves, a patch pocket on the left chest, brand tag appliqued on the pocket, full buttoned placket and a curved hem   Material and Care100% cottonHand or machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 40
